name: Caden Table Lamp (Set of 2) - 27.5 Inch Height - TBL4308 - Clear - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the caden clear glass table lamp set. Each lamp stands at 27.5 inches, adding a touch of elegance to any room. The clear glass body seamlessly blends with various decor styles, offering a versatile lighting solution that complements both contemporary and traditional settings.

Crafted from durable glass and iron, these lamps are designed with an e26 socket to accommodate your choice of bulb. The harmonious blend of 80 percent glass and 20 percent iron delivers a sleek and minimalist aesthetic.

Perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, or home offices, the caden set of two lamps provides a balanced glow that enhances ambiance while serving as an eye-catching decorative piece. Add sophistication to your living space with this exquisite glass table lamp set. Embrace modern simplicity and make a statement in your home decor.
